The '''Blue Wings of Strength''' were a sacred [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] item that had once belonged to an ancient Ewok warrior. Around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], prior to the journey to locate and rescue the parents of [[Mace Towani|Mace]] and [[Cindel Towani]] from the [[Gorax/Legends|Gorax]], [[Widdle Warrick/Legends|Widdle Warrick]] was presented the sacred item by the Ewok elder [[Logray/Legends|Logray]]. The item comprised a headband with tufts of blue feathers on each side.

==Appearances==
*''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]'' {{1st}}
